title: Promotion and reserve leagues reach business end
bodyText: [{"type":"intro_bold","text":"The semi-finalists in the reserve league, which will be contested on Saturday, were also determined last weekend."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"CRICKET NEWS - SWD Cricket’s promotion and reserve league competitions are reaching their business end.","html":"CRICKET NEWS - SWD Cricket’s promotion and reserve league competitions are reaching their business end."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The Plett Pioneers (184/5) have strengthened their position for a place in the top three with a six-wicket victory against NMU Madibaz."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The log standings of the top four teams in the promotion league are:","html":"The log standings of the top four teams in the promotion league are:"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"1st: Pirates United - 30 points (7 matches)","html":"1st: Pirates United - 30 points (7 matches)"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"2nd: Plett Pioneers - 25 points (7 matches)","html":"2nd: Plett Pioneers - 25 points (7 matches)"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"3rd: Ramblers - 22 points (7 matches)","html":"3rd: Ramblers - 22 points (7 matches)"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"4th: Mossel Bay - 2 points (7 matches)","html":"4th: Mossel Bay - 2 points (7 matches)"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The semi-finalists in the reserve league, which will be contested on Saturday, were also determined last weekend.","html":"The semi-finalists in the reserve league, which will be contested on Saturday, were also determined last weekend."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"In the Reserve League Division 1, Beaufort West, Harlequins Forces C, Western Hope and Mayflower have advanced to the play-offs.","html":"In the Reserve League Division 1, Beaufort West, Harlequins Forces C, Western Hope and Mayflower have advanced to the play-offs."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The respective pool winners in the Reserve League Division 2 that will play in the semi-finals are Knysna Cavaliers B, Calitzdorp Young Stars, Sussex B and Sussex C.","html":"The respective pool winners in the Reserve League Division 2 that will play in the semi-finals are Knysna Cavaliers B, Calitzdorp Young Stars, Sussex B and Sussex C."}]

author: SWD Cricket
teaser: The semi-finalists in the reserve league, which will be contested on Saturday, were also determined last weekend.
